items.question: Deploy BedRock Astro site to Vercel?
items.context: PR #1 merged; site/ scaffold is ready. Vercel CLI needs auth — either (a) share vercel login email + OTP via device flow, (b) give me a token from https://vercel.com/account/tokens, or (c) you deploy yourself: `cd ~/BedRock && npx vercel --prod`. No domain decision required for first deploy — will land at auto-assigned vercel.app URL and we can add a custom domain later.
options: a — share email, I'll handle OTP
b — I'll paste a Vercel token
skip, keep on surge.sh for now

items.question: Prototype the self-evolving persona system (v0, ~10h)?
items.context: Full research brief + architecture + buildable scope at https://taylorblue123.github.io/morning-brief/page.html?path=experiments/self-evolving-persona — summary: episodic event log → nightly distillation cron → persona core (semantic claims with provenance) → /persona viewer page. Answers your 'tedious briefing' pain directly. v0 = local-only, chat + commits + journal sources only (no file-system traces for privacy).
